category_sources: Official GNU wdiff page describes it as a front end to diff for word-by-word comparison.
source_facts.description says wdiff displays word differences between text files.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page titles the project Wdiff and identifies it as GNU wdiff.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GNU wdiff page.
docs_sources: Official GNU project page is the project homepage.
Official GNU wdiff manual is the dedicated documentation.
repo_sources: Official GNU wdiff developer guide says the sources are kept in a Bazaar repository at Savannah and gives the clone URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists wdiff, wdiff2, mdiff, and unify command-line tools.
